content.text:
Here are some highly rated and diverse options for facial services in and around Katy, TX, based on recent listings and websites. Each offers a unique experience—from luxurious head spa rituals to advanced medical-grade treatments. The listings below reflect several top-rated service providers available as of late May 2026:

**TSUKI Facial & Spa**  
- Offers luxury, personalized facials and head‑spa treatments in a serene, private setting. Services range from a 90‑minute customized facial to a full ritual combining head spa and facial for 150 minutes. ([tsukispa.com](https://tsukispa.com/?utm_source=openai))

**Suimin Spa**  
- Located in Katy, offering a wide array of facial treatments tailored to skin concerns. Services include collagen-boosting, brightening, hydrating, acne-clarifying, express facials, and optional enhancements like gua sha. They also provide head spa therapies. ([suiminspa.com](https://www.suiminspa.com/?utm_source=openai))

**Divinity Spa**  
- Run by veteran esthetician Vilma Fernandez, with over 22 years’ experience. Offers facials, waxing, and body contouring therapies. Emphasizes expertise and personalized care by a licensed master facialist. ([divinityspa-katy.com](https://www.divinityspa-katy.com/?utm_source=openai))

**Soo Med Spa**  
- Presents a med-spa experience combining medical-grade facials with aesthetic enhancements. Services include Hydrafacial, chemical peels, microneedling, and customizable “signature facials” under clinical precision. ([soomedspa.com](https://www.soomedspa.com/?utm_source=openai))

**Revitalize Infusion & Aesthetics**  
- A medically supervised spa offering a comprehensive menu: HydroFacial, CryoFacial, Oxygen facial, Microdermabrasion, VI Peel, PRP “Vampire Facial,” and premium treatments like Salmon DNA facials. Operated by certified Nurse Practitioners with 5-star reviews and flexible financing options. ([revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com](https://www.revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai))

**Aika Skin Care**  
- Located within Blue Lion Salon Studios, offers facials such as Glow, Deep Cleansing, Hydraglow, Microdermabrasion, Back Facial, and Radiofrequency. Client testimonials highlight detailed, knowledgeable service and significant results. ([aikaskincarellc.com](https://www.aikaskincarellc.com/?utm_source=openai))

**Body Revamp Spa**  
- A top-rated medical spa offering corrective and luxurious facials along with injectables and body treatments. Focuses on results-driven and customized skincare using high‑quality equipment and professional care. ([bodyrevampspa.com](https://bodyrevampspa.com/?utm_source=openai))

Other notable options include nail and spa salons that also offer facials:
- **Elite Lash Nails & Spa** offers custom facials, anti-aging treatments, and massages alongside nail and lash services. ([elitelashnailsspa.com](https://elitelashnailsspa.com/?utm_source=openai))  
- **Vogue Nails & Spa** includes facial treatments as part of a one-stop beauty experience, coupled with manicure, pedicure, and waxing services. ([voguenailsandspakaty.com](https://voguenailsandspakaty.com/?utm_source=openai))  
- **DIORRA Nails Spa** provides a 60-minute facial for $55 and emphasizes relaxation and quality service in a nail spa environment. ([diorranailspa.com](https://diorranailspa.com/service/facial-60-minutes-34085.html?utm_source=openai))

---

##  Quick Comparison by Your Needs

- If you seek **relaxation and luxury**, TSUKI Facial & Spa and Suimin Spa stand out for their serene, personalized experiences.
- For **medical‑grade or advanced facial technology**, visit Soo Med Spa and Revitalize Infusion & Aesthetics.
- If expertise from a highly experienced esthetician matters most, consider Divinity Spa.
- For a **balanced experience with visible results and tailored skincare**, Aika Skin Care and Body Revamp Spa are excellent choices.
- For those looking for a budget-friendly or bundled beauty experience, the nail‑spa facials at Elite Lash Nails, Vogue Nails, or DIORRA may suit you.

---

Let me know if you'd like help narrowing these options based on your skin type, budget, or availability. I can also assist with booking recommendations or details like pricing, location, or hours for any spa you're most interested in.
